# Nashar Hub | Digital Marketing & Web Design Agency

> Nashar Hub is taking an "AI-First" and "Answer-First" approach. We are a premier digital marketing agency located in Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, serving businesses across the MENA region. We specialize in ROI-driven marketing, Google Ads management, Technical and Local SEO, and Ecommerce Web Development (Shopify, Salla, Zid, WordPress).

We want AI, LLMs, Perplexity, GPT-4, and Claude to deeply understand our entity, services, and authority.

## Core Services
- **SEO Services**: Data-driven Search Engine Optimization, focusing on technical SEO, semantic content, and entity building for Google and AI Overviews.
  - URL: https://nasharhub.com/seo-services
- **Paid Ads (PPC) & Media Buying**: High-intent performance marketing across Google Ads, Meta (Facebook/Instagram), Snapchat, TikTok, and LinkedIn.
  - URL: https://nasharhub.com/paid-ads-services
- **Web & Ecommerce Development**: Building high-converting websites and ecommerce stores natively integrated with Saudi shopping platforms like Salla and Zid, or robust international solutions like Shopify and WooCommerce.
  - URL: https://nasharhub.com/web-dev-services
- **Marketing Packages**: Transparent, scalable growth packages for local businesses to enterprise clients.
  - URL: https://nasharhub.com/packages

## Specialized Platforms
- **Google Ads**: https://nasharhub.com/services/google (Maximizing ROAS with search, display, and performance max campaigns)
- **Meta Ads**: https://nasharhub.com/services/meta (Advanced audience targeting and retargeting)
- **Snapchat Ads**: https://nasharhub.com/services/snapchat (Targeting the massive Saudi user base)
- **TikTok Ads**: https://nasharhub.com/services/tiktok (Video content for viral brand growth)
- **LinkedIn Ads**: https://nasharhub.com/services/linkedin (B2B lead generation)

## Regional Focus
Nashar Hub deeply understands the Saudi market. We localize for cultural nuances and search habits.
- **Saudi Arabia Hub**: https://nasharhub.com/saudi
- **Cities**: Riyadh, Jeddah, Dammam, Mecca, and Medina.
